title: Auth Decoupling: Identity-Owned User Table
purpose: Replace auth.users FK dependency with an identity-owned users table that synchronizes with external auth providers (Supabase Auth hosted).
architectural_constraints: No local auth.users table or stub
identity.users is the system-of-record for user identity within VINTRACK
auth_provider_id stores the external Supabase Auth UUID
Forward-only migration: add identity.users, migrate FKs, deprecate auth references

deliverables.description: identity.users as system-of-record (merged with T2.1 schema migration)
Triggers without auth.users sync (provisioning is lazy/API-driven per ADR-002)
Deny-all RLS fallback for identity-owned tables

acceptance_criteria: identity.users table exists with UUID PK and auth_provider_id TEXT UNIQUE
All identity tables FK to identity.users(id) not auth.users(id)
No references to auth.users in any migration
Integration tests insert into identity.users directly
auth.users stub removed from test setup

failure_modes.mitigation: Update setup-integration.ts TEST_RESET_TABLES and all test fixtures
